title: Crowd Waves as Social Phase Transition

analysis.object: T602: Crowd Waves as Social Phase Transition depth analysis

individual_eml0.reason: Individual in crowd is EML-0: standing or sitting; no cooperative dynamics alone

wave_propagation.reason: Crowd wave is EML-3: oscillatory standing wave propagating through discrete EML-0 individuals

critical_density.description: Wave requires critical density threshold: depth transition at minimum crowd density
critical_density.reason: Threshold is TYPE2: below critical density nothing; above critical density spontaneous EML-3 wave

social_phase_transition.description: Crowd wave = social phase transition; density is control parameter
social_phase_transition.reason: Social categorification: EML-0 individuals + EML-3 wave requires EML-inf threshold crossing

analysis.theorem: T602: Crowd Waves as Social Phase Transition (S881).

key_theorem: T602: Crowd Waves as Social Phase Transition (S881).
